objective: Final pre-build QA review of metaswarm and SwarmMesh readiness using the synced launcher and fixed Agent Pulse. Verify commander launch, premium model policy, collaboration bus creation, sub-agent telemetry, Agent Pulse live counts, stop/recovery behavior, and implementation gaps.
summary: CI and smoke tests validate only structural scaffolding (lint, smoke, schema fields) but do not exercise behavioral enforcement for premium/banned model policy, Depth Guard overflow/partial paths, or stop/recovery. Docs show metaswarm requirements in README/AGENTS, yet install.sh provides no metaswarm/policy/telemetry guidance, and AGENTS.md omits premium/banned policy and swarm-state.json references.
consensus: All reviewers agree coverage is structural/contract-only; no behavioral enforcement for banned models, Depth Guard overflow, or stop/recovery. Docs and installer are not fully aligned on metaswarm policy/telemetry details.
